title: ComfortCare Incontinence Bed Pad, Waterproof Mattress Protector without Tucks, Washable bed wetting sheet for adults or children, Single Bed Pack of 2, Pink, one in use, one as Spare.
features: Ensure maximum protection for your single bed with a twin pack of washable, waterproof mattress protectors/Absorbent Incontinence Bed Pads without wings. Each pad can hold up to 3 litres of liquid, so you can rest easy knowing your bed is safe from spills and accidents. Plus, with a spare pad included, you'll always have backup protection on hand. Get your twin pack now for ultimate protection and peace of mind.

100% Waterproof Barrier - prevents liquid staining and damaging your bedding and mattress, ideal when toilet training, and with a Stay-Dry Top Surface, it helps keep the user dry and protects against soreness and infection. As it is Portable and discreet, it is ideal for children and adults and is perfect for travelling.

Easily Removed When Wet –Being versatile in use, these bed pads can be used both on top or underneath the bed sheets depending on your preference, although when using them on top, spills and ‘accidents’ in the night are dealt with quickly and easily.

Highly Absorbent Capacity of 3000ml (3 Litres), Size: 75 x 90 cm (29½” x 35”) Suitable for a single bed. 2 pads 1 in use and one as spare, Colour Pink, Fully Washable at 95°C, Tumble Dry on Medium Heat – easy & convenient to clean & maintain.
ComfortCare Products are Sold to Hospitals, Local Authorities and Care Homes across the UK - Trusted by multiple care providers – so you’re safe in the knowledge that you’ve made the right choice.
description: Product Description Cost effective and reliable, this product aims to offer the user comfort Introducing the premium quality washable and reusable bed protector from ComfortCare. This innovative product has been designed to offer you comfort and protection from all forms of liquid. Unlike other bed protectors, the top layer of this pad is made from a special fabric that allows liquids to quickly pass through, keeping you dry and comfortable all night long. Additionally, its unique 'Super Absorbency' padding keeps moisture away from your skin, ensuring a peaceful and comfortable night's sleep while protecting against soreness and infection. Available in Blue or pink, as a Single pad or as a Twin pack. Suitable for use by Adults, children and babies The ComfortCare bed protector is an ultra-soft pad that is perfect for adults, children, and babies. Its durable design allows it to be washed and reused many times, and it becomes even more absorbent after its initial washes. It can be washed at high temperatures of up to 95°C, making it ideal for use in care settings that require thermal disinfection and can be tumble-dried. This bed protector is not only reliable and cost-effective but also promotes independence for users. Its high absorbency and reliability will reduce the need for frequent bedding changes, providing maximum protection and peace of mind. The integral waterproof barrier ensures that your bed remains clean, dry, and stain-free while your bed linen remains protected. Reduce the need for bedding changes Experience maximum protection, absorbency and reliability with all of our ComfortCare bed protection products, now available in a discreet design. Join the countless satisfied customers who have made ComfortCare bed protectors their top choice for premium incontinence protection and discover unparalleled comfort and quality for yourself. Incontinence Washable Bed Pad, Blue Care Instructions Wash once before use Can be washed up to 95°C Do not use bleach or fabric conditioner Tumble dry on a medium heat setting Allow 5 minutes cool-down period before folding Do Not Iron or Dry clean. Do not expose to direct heat Product specification Bed pad Size: 85 x 90 cms, 35½" x 35½" Absorbent Capacity: 3000ml (3 litres) Available in Blue or Pink White lower surface Certification: Standard 100 by OEKO-TEX Peace of mind This product is both cost-effective and reliable. Its primary purpose is to promote continence care in the home by providing comfort, instilling confidence, and promoting independence. The mat has been designed for long-term use and can be washed and reused many times, making it a sustainable and practical choice for those in need of continence care.
